notes: Test supplement stack upload for validation

manualSupplementData.stackNotes: Comprehensive supplement regimen for overall health, cognitive performance, and fitness goals. Focus on high-quality, evidence-based supplements with proper timing and dosing.
manualSupplementData.timingNotes: Take vitamins with breakfast for optimal absorption. Separate fat-soluble vitamins from minerals. Take pre-workout 30 minutes before exercise. Take evening supplements with dinner or before bed.
manualSupplementData.frequencyNotes: Daily regimen with 6 days on, 1 day off cycling for certain compounds. Adjust based on training schedule and recovery needs.
